title: haw.plugin.view/1
description: A structured panel a plugin prints to stdout when invoked in render intent (HAW_RENDER=1, context intent=render). haw renders the title followed by each string in lines in the cockpit's plugin detail panel. Anything that is not a haw.plugin.view/1 document is shown verbatim as raw text.

title.description: Panel title, rendered above the lines.

lines.description: Panel body — one string per rendered line. Output is line-capped to keep the panel bounded.
